title: cheilanthes longipes
intro: Cheilanthes longipes, also known as the walking fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes longipes include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Cheilanthes longipes can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to address a range of health issues.
